title: The Mystery Woman on the GTA6 Cover Art — Fans Think They Found Her
headline: Curly hair. Green crop top. Gold jewelry. A timestamp that predates the cover by a year.
excerpt: The woman in the bottom-left panel of the GTA6 cover art has no official name. But fans found a Venezuelan DJ named Gabriela Chiquin who posted a matching photo over a year before the cover dropped. The timestamp does not lie.

title: GTA6 Cover Art — Every Frame Broken Down and What It Tells Us
headline: Nine panels. Every character. Every vehicle. Every detail explained.
excerpt: The official GTA6 cover art is here. We break down every single panel frame by frame — Jason, Lucia, Raul Bautista at the Sinfrontera National Bank, Boobie Ike, the alligator, the flamingo, and everything Rockstar packed into nine panels.

title: IT'S HAPPENING — GTA6 Pre-Orders Open June 25, Official Cover Art Revealed
headline: Pre-orders open in 7 days. The cover art is here. November 19 is locked.
excerpt: Rockstar Games just confirmed GTA6 pre-orders open June 25, 2026 on digital storefronts and retailers — and dropped the official cover art featuring Jason, Lucia, and Vice City. The summer marketing push has begun.

title: Tribunal Rules Against Rockstar — Blacklisting Claims Proceed to Trial Sept 10
headline: Full trial starts September 10 — six weeks before GTA6 launches
excerpt: A UK employment tribunal rejected Rockstar's attempt to strip blacklisting claims from the union-busting case. Every allegation proceeds to full trial starting September 10 — with GTA6 launching five weeks later on November 19.

title: GTA Online's Final Big Heist Before GTA6 — Kortz Center Drops July 2026
headline: Art theft, counterfeiting, multi-stage — and likely the last major send-off before GTA6
excerpt: Rockstar just announced The Kortz Center Heist for GTA Online in July 2026. Multi-stage art theft heist at Los Santos most famous landmark — and almost certainly the final major update before GTA6 launches November 19.

title: She Gets 33M Views a Month Working One Day a Week — Here's the AI System
headline: Sabrina Ramonov built a 2.4M follower empire using Blotato and Claude
excerpt: Forbes 30 Under 30 AI founder Sabrina Ramonov gets 33 million monthly views working one day a week. Here is the exact AI system she built — and how to get her free resources.

title: Take-Two CEO Gets Ambushed on the Street — Confirms GTA6 Date
headline: Zelnick confirmed November 19 to a TikToker who didn't even know who he was
excerpt: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick got stopped in a surprise street interview and confirmed GTA6 launches November 19 — unprompted, unscripted, and on camera.

title: The GTA Construction Theory: A Hidden Timeline?
headline: One skyscraper, five games — and it might finally be done
